channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: LDO surges, but the upside hinges on breaking $0.33. If bullish momentum holds, targets tilt to $0.35-$0.40 in weeks. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260328-ldo-price-prediction-targets-035-040-recovery-by-april-2026 #crypto #LDO #price

item.title: HBAR eyes a 0.10 breakout—but momentum is neutral, risk leans bearish short-term. Will volume spark a move or fade? 🔥⚖️ https://Blockchain.News/news/20260328-price-prediction-hbar-hedera-targets-010-breakout-by-april #crypto #blockchain #Hedera

item.title: 🔥 WIF eyes a crack at $0.19 resistance as April pivots. Will the breakout follow the chart, or stay boxed in? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260328-price-prediction-wif-targets-019-resistance-test-by-april #WIF #crypto #priceaction
